<!-- goal-48 W1 build-contract — generated by understand-workflow wf_be47d89d-e57, 2026-06-26. Design=LAG anchor for the W1 build. -->

I have everything needed: both `model.ts` and `flag.ts` exist (reuse, don't recreate), and `listTenantsWithStats()` is the real cross-tenant feed for SuperEntry. The count discrepancies resolve cleanly (cfg-data.js is mockup; runtime data = real presets). Here is the locked build-contract.

---

# W1 BUILD-CONTRACT — goal-48 Onboarding-studio "studio-skal" (SHELL)

**Design = LAG.** Shell chrome = exact design copy. Panel bodies = functional reuse of `CreateTenantForm` fields. No new DB writes. Flag-OFF byte-identical. Preview = placeholder (real render = W2).

**Operative-data resolution (read first):** The design files `cfg-data.js` (`BRANCHES`/`MODULES`/`ST_THEMES`) are **MOCKUP reference**, NOT product data. Runtime lists come from the REAL `loadVerticalPresets()` → `VerticalPresetData`, already ported by `model.ts`. Therefore the brief/cfg-data counts (17/18 modules·verticals, "6 vs 5" themes) are **non-operative** — the studio renders whatever `presets` and `STOREFRONT_THEMES` actually contain. ONLY two things are reused verbatim from cfg-data: (a) the `PHASES` structure (StepRail config), (b) the visual specs (px/hex/fonts/layout). The catalog DATA is never ported as if real.

---

## 1. FILE LAYOUT

**EXISTING — REUSE, do NOT recreate** (already on disk, untracked, from the built foundation):
- `5-Kod/apps/web/lib/platform/onboarding-studio/model.ts` — `StudioCfg` type, `initStudioCfg(defaultTheme, variant?)`, `applyBranch(cfg, key, presets)`, `resolveModuleState(cfg, key, presets)`, `studioSlugify(s)`. This is the W1 cfg model (leaner than design's `app.jsx` INIT — no `placement`/`content.services`/`content.hero`/`owner` object; those are later waves).
- `5-Kod/apps/web/lib/platform/onboarding-studio/model.test.ts` — existing 8 tests; extend, don't replace.
- `5-Kod/apps/web/lib/platform/onboarding-studio/flag.ts` — `onboardingStudioEnabled()` (reads `process.env.ONBOARDING_STUDIO_ENABLED === 'true'` at CALL TIME).

**NEW FILES — create under `5-Kod/apps/web/components/platform/onboarding-studio/`** (directory does not yet exist):
| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `OnboardingStudio.tsx` | Root **client** component (`'use client'`). Props `{ presets: VerticalPresetData; editorEnabled: boolean }`. Owns the stage machine (`super \| studio \| result`), the `StudioCfg` state (via `initStudioCfg('salvia')` + a reducer/`A`-action set ported from `app.jsx:29–60`), the active `step` (init `'branch'`), and `useActionState(createTenant, {})`. Renders `JourneyBar` always; switches `SuperEntry` / studio-row / result by stage. Builds the FormData submit on Lansera. |
| `JourneyBar.tsx` | Top 54px bar (Kunder→Studio→Live). Pure presentational; props = current stage + reachability + `onNav`. |
| `SuperEntry.tsx` | "Kunder" stage. Props `{ tenants: TenantCardItem[]; onStart }`. Real tenant list (§8). |
| `StepRail.tsx` | 248px left rail. Props `{ cfg, step, onStep, presets }`. Reads `PHASES` (§4) for the 5/12 structure; derives per-step `done` from real `StudioCfg`. |
| `PanelHost.tsx` | 420px column = `Panel` scaffold wrapper + active panel (via registry) + `FooterNav` (Föregående/Nästa). Props `{ cfg, step, dispatch, presets, onPrev, onNext }`. |
| `StudioPanels.tsx` | All 12 panel render-functions + `PANEL_BY_STEP: Record<StepId, FC<PanelProps>>` registry. ONE file (mirrors the codebase convention — `CreateTenantForm` is one file; keeps W1 stubs lean). Each panel reuses existing form controls (§5). |
| `PreviewPane.tsx` | `BrowserFrame` outer chrome (frame + 3 traffic lights + URL pill + conditional LIVE badge + desktop/mobile device toggle) wrapping a **structural PLACEHOLDER skeleton** as `children`. Real `<Storefront/>` render = W2. |
| `LaunchOverlay.tsx` *(optional, thin)* | Cosmetic launching overlay. **If built, it must NOT animate the 6 fake DB-task lines as if they fired** (status-honesty). Recommend: a simple spinner gated on `isPending` from `useActionState`, then show the REAL `ActionState.success`/`error`. The design's `LaunchSequence` 6-task theatre is DEFERRED (W3). |

**NEW DATA FILE — create under `5-Kod/apps/web/lib/platform/onboarding-studio/`** (lives next to `model.ts`, not in components):
- `phases.ts` — exports `PHASES` (the 5-phase / 12-step config, §4) + `StepId` union + `FLAT_STEP_ORDER = PHASES.flatMap(p=>p.steps.map(s=>s.id))`. Ported verbatim from `cfg-data.js:303–331`. This is static config, NOT DB.

**CSS:** Do **NOT** author a `*.module.css`. Project convention (Reader D: `CreateTenantForm` is 100% inline-styled `var(--c-*)`; `model.ts:5–6` mandate "byte-identical fallback") = inline styles keyed to the existing global tokens in `packages/ui/tokens.css`. Lift exact px/hex from the design into inline `style={{}}` exactly as `CreateTenantForm.tsx:78–109,384–407` does.

**EDITS to existing files** (exact diffs in §7):
- `5-Kod/apps/web/wrangler.jsonc` — add `ONBOARDING_STUDIO_ENABLED` (top `"false"`, `env.staging` `"true"`).
- `5-Kod/apps/web/app/(platform)/salonger/ny/page.tsx` — flag-branch studio vs `CreateTenantForm`.

## 2. COMPONENT TREE (port vs reuse)

```
OnboardingStudio (NEW; ports app.jsx:19 App + INIT + A-actions)         [port]
├─ JourneyBar (NEW; ports app.jsx:65–95)                                [port]
├─ stage==="super"  → SuperEntry (NEW; ports stages.jsx:17–66)          [port]
├─ stage==="studio" → flex row (ports app.jsx:119–131)
│   ├─ StepRail (NEW; ports studio.jsx:8–53)                            [port]
│   ├─ PanelHost (NEW; ports studio.jsx:399–418 PanelColumn+FooterNav)  [port]
│   │   └─ PANEL_BY_STEP[step] (NEW StudioPanels.tsx; ports the 12 Panel*)
│   │       └─ reuses CreateTenantForm field controls                   [reuse]
│   └─ PreviewPane (NEW; ports preview.jsx:545–576 BrowserFrame ONLY)   [port-shell]
│       └─ children = PLACEHOLDER skeleton (real Storefront = W2)        [stub]
└─ stage==="result" → real ActionState.success banner                   [reuse createTenant return]
```

**Primitive mapping (design `S*` → existing `components/portal/ui/*`, imported the way `CreateTenantForm.tsx:17–18` does):**
| Design primitive | Existing target | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `SBtn` | `Button` (portal/ui) | map variants primary/gold/ghost; sizes sm/md/lg |
| `SCard` | `Card` (portal/ui) | `var(--c-paper)`/`--c-line`/radius 16/`--shadow-sm` already match (`Card.tsx:21–35`) |
| `SBadge` | `Badge` (portal/ui) | tones success/info/warning/danger |
| `SField` | port a thin `Field` (CreateTenantForm has an inline `Field`; lift it or reuse its pattern) | label 12.5 / input 14 / focus `--c-forest` |
| `SToggle` (modval) | **reuse CreateTenantForm module state-pills** (`:623–625`), NOT a binary toggle | divergence: design shows a toggle; W1 reuses the existing off/draft/live/paused pills |
| `Icon` | `Icon` (portal/ui, already imported by CreateTenantForm) | **verify icon-name coverage — see §10 risk** |
| `SEyebrow`/`TChip`/`SpecStrip`/`SpecNote` | inline (small presentational spans) or skip | `TChip`/`SpecStrip`/`SpecNote` are design "spec-läge" annotations → presentational only; render plainly or omit in W1 (not load-bearing) |

`PageHead` + intro `Callout`: the studio owns its own (as `CreateTenantForm.tsx:335–346`); keep outer host `<div style={{maxWidth:820}}>` so the flag-flip does not shift layout (`CreateTenantForm.tsx:334`).

## 3. DESIGN TOKENS (verbatim values — VERIFY against existing `packages/ui/tokens.css`, do NOT re-author as module.css)

These already exist under `[data-world="backoffice"]` (`packages/ui/tokens.css`) and the studio renders inside `(platform)/layout.tsx`'s `<PortalShell world="backoffice">` (`:14`), which activates them. Consume inline as `var(--c-*)`. **Builder action: confirm each token below exists; if a design token is missing, ADD it to `tokens.css` (presentational, allowed) — do not hardcode the hex.**

**Palette** (index.html `:root` 19–38):
```
--c-forest #1F4636   --c-forest-700 #173529   --c-forest-300 #4E7363
--c-gold #F5A623     --c-gold-600 #D98E12      --c-gold-100 #FBEBCB
--c-cream #FAF8F4    --c-paper #FFFFFF         --c-paper-2 #F3EFE8
--c-line #E7E1D6     --c-line-strong #D8D0C2
--c-ink #21261F      --c-ink-2 #555C50         --c-ink-3 #8A8F82
--c-on-forest #EFEAE0   --c-on-forest-2 #9DB1A6
--c-success #4E7A5E  --c-success-bg #E8F0EA
--c-warning #A37D3C  --c-warning-bg #F3EBD9
--c-danger #9E5A57   --c-danger-bg #F1E2E0
--c-info #5E748C     --c-info-bg #E6EAF0
```
One-off non-token color: **`#3A2A06`** (ink-on-gold; gold-button text + JourneyBar active pill). SBadge.neutral hardcodes `#EFEBE3`/`#A7AC9E`.

**Shadows:** `--shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(31,70,54,.06),0 1px 3px rgba(31,70,54,.08)`; `--shadow-md: 0 4px 14px rgba(31,70,54,.08),0 2px 6px rgba(31,70,54,.06)`; `--shadow-lg: 0 18px 48px rgba(23,53,41,.16)` (BrowserFrame).

**Fonts:** `--font-display:'Playfair Display',Georgia,serif`; `--font-ui:'Inter',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif`. (Shell chrome uses ONLY these two; storefront theme fonts are W2.)

**Motion:** `--dur-fast:160ms; --dur-base:280ms; --ease-out:cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)`.

**Type scale (inline, no tokens):** Panel title **21** (display/700, `--c-forest`); SuperEntry h1 **34**; SuperEntry stat value **30**; Live slug **24**; rail brand title **14.5**; rail step label **13.5**; rail phase eyebrow **10**; rail brand eyebrow **9.5**; SField label **12.5** / input **14**; SEyebrow **10.5**; SBadge **11.5**; TChip **11**; tenant-row name **14.5** / subline **12.5**.

**Radii (inline):** buttons/fields 10, cards/frame 16, pills/badges/toggle 999, branch card 12, theme card 14, module row 12, chips 7, rail brand tile 8, step button 9, avatar 10, icon tiles 8–11.

**Spacing (recurring gaps/pads):** gaps 6/8/9/10/11/12/14/16/18/20/24; JourneyBar `height 54, padding "0 18px", gap 16`; StepRail `padding "20px 14px"`; PanelColumn `width 420`; Panel header `padding "22px 24px 16px"`, body `padding 24`; FooterNav `padding "12px 24px"`.

## 4. STEPRAIL DATA — 5 phases / 12 steps (port verbatim from `cfg-data.js:303–331` into `phases.ts`)

Phase header renders `{pi+1}. {ph.name}` (`studio.jsx:29`); `ph.sub` is data-present but **NOT rendered** in the rail. Flat order for prev/next = `PHASES.flatMap(p=>p.steps.map(s=>s.id))`.

| # | phase id / name | step id | step label | icon | req |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `grund` / **Grunden** | `branch` | **Bransch** | `building` | **true** |
| | | `namn` | **Namn & subdomän** | `link` | **true** |
| | | `tema` | **Temamall** | `palette` | **true** |
| 2 | `moduler` / **Moduler** | `modval` | **Välj moduler** | `layers` | false |
| | | `modplace` | **Placera & ordna** | `grid` | false |
| | | `modconf` | **Modulinställningar** | `settings` | false |
| 3 | `innehall` / **Innehåll & utseende** | `brand` | **Branding** | `sun` | false |
| | | `text` | **Text & hjälte** | `edit` | false |
| | | `tjanster` | **Tjänster & innehåll** | `scissors` | false |
| 4 | `konto` / **Ägare & konto** | `agare` | **Ägare & inbjudan** | `user` | false |
| 5 | `lansera` / **Granska & lansera** | `granska` | **Granska checklista** | `checkCircle` | false |
| | | `live` | **Lansera** | `rocket` | **true** |

Phase subs (data only, unused in rail): grund "Det som måste sitta först", moduler "Det som gör sidan till deras", innehall "Texten, färgen, känslan", konto "Vem som styr sidan", lansera "Sista koll, sen live".

**req:true (block Lansera): `branch, namn, tema, live`.**

**Per-step `done` derivation with REAL `StudioCfg`** (port `studio.jsx:10–18`, adapted to leaner W1 cfg):
- `branch` → `!!cfg.branch`
- `namn` → `!!cfg.slug`
- `tema` → `!!cfg.theme` (always truthy — theme defaults `'salvia'`; faithful to design INIT "Salvia")
- `modval` → some `resolveModuleState(cfg,k,presets)` is `live`/`draft`
- `agare` → `!!cfg.ownerEmail`
- `tjanster` → **always `false` in W1** (no `services` field in StudioCfg — deferred, see §5/§9)
- `modplace, modconf, brand, text, granska, live` → `false` (never a checkmark; matches design)

**Rail visuals (port studio.jsx):** brand "C" tile 30×30 r8 `--c-gold` on `--c-forest-700`; phase eyebrow fs10/700/.1em/uppercase `--c-on-forest-2` opacity .7; step button `padding "9px 11px" radius 9 gap 11`, active `bg --c-forest-700 + borderLeft 2px --c-gold`, label fs13.5 (600 active/500 inactive); status bullet 22×22 r999 (done `--c-gold` + `check` icon; active `rgba(255,255,255,.12)` + step icon; else transparent + `1px solid --c-forest-300`); required `•` gold after label; footer legend "• = krävs för att kunna lansera." `borderTop 1px --c-forest-300`.

## 5. THE 12 PANELS (id · title · reused control · W1-real vs deferred)

Panel scaffold (port `studio.jsx:56–67`): column flex; header `padding "22px 24px 16px" borderBottom 1px --c-line` (h2 = display/700/fs21/`--c-forest`, sub p = fs13/`--c-ink-2`); body `flex:1 overflowY:auto padding:24`. Global FooterNav lives in `PanelHost`, not in `Panel.foot` (no panel passes `foot`).

| step | title (verbatim) | reused control(s) | W1 status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `branch` | **"Välj startmall"** | 2-col card grid of **`presets.verticals`** (NOT cfg-data BRANCHES); `onClick → dispatch(applyBranch(cfg,key,presets))`. | **W1-REAL** → `vertical_id`. Card meta (icon, "Roadmap" pill, "N moduler · staffWord") is cfg-data mockup NOT in real presets → render name only, OR derive a static presentational icon map; do **not** show fake per-branch counts. |
| `namn` | **"Namn & subdomän"** | `Field` Företagsnamn → `setName` (auto-syncs slug via `studioSlugify` until `slugTouched`); `Field` Subdomän suffix `.corevo.se` → `setSlug` (**must set `slugTouched`** — see §10 slug wrinkle); reserved-slug warning vs `RESERVED_SUBDOMAINS`. | **W1-REAL** → `name` + `slug`. |
| `tema` | **"Temamall"** | radio list of `presets.templatesByVertical[branch]` else `BUILTIN_TEMPLATES` (the 5 `WIZARD_THEMES`); `onSelect → setTheme(key)` (lowercase key). | **W1-REAL** → `theme`. **Trap:** value must be one of the 5 lowercase `STOREFRONT_THEMES` or it defaults `leander` server-side (§6). |
| `modval` | **"Välj moduler"** | per-module state pills from `modulesForVertical(presets, branch)` (real catalog + preset state); `setModule(key,state)`. booking floored to live/paused. | **W1-REAL UI** → `modules` JSON. rec/opt grouping = derive from `defaultState !== 'off'`; module `short`/`variantNote`/badges are cfg-data mockup → omit or derive, never fabricate. |
| `modplace` | **"Placera & ordna"** | — | **DEFERRED-STUB.** `tenant_site_pages` table missing; `StudioCfg` has no `placement`. Render an honest "kommer senare" empty state, no fake drag. |
| `modconf` | **"Modulinställningar"** | — | **DISPLAY-ONLY** in design (no inputs). W1: render nothing functional / minimal honest placeholder. |
| `brand` | **"Branding"** | accent swatch row (7 accents) → `setAccent(hex)`; `Field` Tagline → `setTagline`. Logo upload = **placeholder box only**. | **PARTIAL-REAL**: accent → `color_accent`, tagline → `tagline`. **Logo DEFERRED** (real File field, R2; not in W1 cfg). |
| `text` | **"Text & hjälte"** | `Field` Företagsnamn (header) → `setName`. Hero/ingress + click-edit-in-preview = W2/W5. | **PARTIAL-STUB.** Name reuses real field; hero/ingress persistence (`site_content_draft`) deferred — W1 submits `'{}'`. |
| `tjanster` | **`{serviceWord}er & innehåll`** | — | **DEFERRED-STUB.** No `services` in StudioCfg; services+prices = W3 (`services.price_cents`). Honest empty state, no fake list. |
| `agare` | **"Ägare & inbjudan"** | `Field` Ägarens namn → `setOwnerName`; `Field` Ägarens e-post (type=email) → `setOwnerEmail`. | **W1-REAL** → `owner_name` + `owner_email` (magic-link invite path). |
| `granska` | **"Granska checklista"** | derived checklist (port `LAUNCH_CHECK` status logic, adapted to real cfg); "Gå till lansering" → `onStep('live')`. | **DISPLAY-ONLY** (derived, no writes). Derive from real cfg fields, not mock. |
| `live` | **"Lansera"** | slug card `{cfg.slug\|\|'dinsalong'}.corevo.se` (fs24) + active-module count; readiness gate `cfg.theme && some module live`; gold `Lansera`-button (disabled until ready) → **build FormData → submit `createTenant` via `useActionState`**. | **W1-REAL** = the single createTenant trigger. Show the REAL `ActionState.success`/`error`, NOT a faked 6-step animation. |

## 6. cfg → FormData MAP (the Lansera contract — `createTenant`, `actions.ts:56–296`)

`createTenant`'s ONLY hard requirements: **`name` + valid `slug`**. Everything else optional/defaulted. Build FormData on Lansera, then `formAction`/`useActionState(createTenant,{})` (`CreateTenantForm.tsx:202`). Replicate the existing hidden-input shape (`CreateTenantForm.tsx:351–372`).

| StudioCfg field | FormData key | Format / contract | Gap handling |
|---|---|---|---|
| `branch` | `vertical_id` | `.slice(0,64)`; empty→null server-side (`actions.ts:96`) | emit always (empty ok) |
| `name` | `name` | **REQUIRED**, trimmed non-empty | — |
| `slug` | `slug` | **REQUIRED**, `validateSlug` (DNS label 2–63, not reserved) | — |
| `theme` | `theme` | **TRAP:** `pickTheme` accepts only `salvia/leander/zigge/linnea/edit` (lowercase); else silently → `'leander'` (`tenant-data.ts:28`) | send one of the 5 lowercase keys |
| `variant` | `booking_variant` | `wizard\|compact\|drawer\|inline` else `'wizard'` | **GAP: no variant UI in W1** (design shell has none; `applyBranch` doesn't set it) → always `'wizard'`. Honest stub, §9. |
| `moduleStates` | `modules` | `JSON.stringify({key:state})`, state∈off/draft/live/paused; replicate `moduleSubmitMap` (`:298–304`): include all keys, force booking live/paused, off-keys allowed (server drops) | — |
| `accent` | `color_accent` | hex `#rgb`/`#rrggbb` only; else skipped. **accent ONLY** (no primary/bg/fg — theme owns palette) | omit input when `accent===''` |
| `tagline` | `tagline` | `.slice(0,160)`; → `settings.copy.tagline` when non-empty | — |
| `ownerName` | `owner_name` | `.slice(0,120)` | — |
| `ownerEmail` | `owner_email` | must match `EMAIL_RE` if present; empty = no invite (still creates) | — |

**Required-by-createTenant fields NOT in StudioCfg → how W1 fills them:**
- `owner_role` — fixed hidden `"salon_admin"` (mirror `CreateTenantForm.tsx:372`; `resolveOwnerRole` defaults anyway).
- `city` — not in StudioCfg; omit (defaults `null`).
- `logo` — real **File** field; W1 has no logo cfg → **omit** (deferred). Must be a multipart File input when added later, never a cfg string.
- `site_content_draft` — submit **`'{}'`** in W1 (fold is salvia-only, `onboarding-fold.ts:28`; text persistence = W5).

**StudioCfg fields with no createTenant home:** none — all 10 map. The broader design cfg (`services`+priser, `placement`, per-module config, hero text) has no W1 home → W3/W4/W5.

## 7. FLAG WIRING (byte-identical-OFF guaranteed)

**`wrangler.jsonc`** — mirror `SAJTBYGGARE_ENABLED` exactly (named envs do NOT inherit top-level vars → both edits required).

Top-level `vars` (after `:49–55` `SAJTBYGGARE_ENABLED`):
```jsonc
    "SAJTBYGGARE_ENABLED": "true",
    // goal-48: onboarding-studio. OFF i prod → /salonger/ny = oförändrad CreateTenantForm.
    "ONBOARDING_STUDIO_ENABLED": "false"
  },
```
`env.staging.vars` (after `:153–155`):
```jsonc
        "SAJTBYGGARE_ENABLED": "true",
        // goal-48 — onboarding-studio ENABLED on staging only.
        "ONBOARDING_STUDIO_ENABLED": "true"
      }
```

**`app/(platform)/salonger/ny/page.tsx`** — add imports + flag-branch; the `<CreateTenantForm .../>` line stays UNCHANGED so OFF is byte-identical:
```ts
import { onboardingStudioEnabled } from '@/lib/platform/onboarding-studio/flag'
import { OnboardingStudio } from '@/components/platform/onboarding-studio/OnboardingStudio'
```
```tsx
export default async function NewTenantPage() {
  const presets = await loadVerticalPresets()
  const editorEnabled = sajtbyggareEnabled()
  const studioEnabled = onboardingStudioEnabled()   // CALL TIME, never module scope
  return (
    <section className="portal-section">
      {studioEnabled ? (
        <OnboardingStudio presets={presets} editorEnabled={editorEnabled} />
      ) : (
        <CreateTenantForm presets={presets} editorEnabled={editorEnabled} />
      )}
    </section>
  )
}
```
`loadVerticalPresets()` is fetched once and shared (no new DB read in W1). OFF → identical render path + identical props as today.

---

## 8. SUPERENTRY — real tenant list (NO new query)

**Source: reuse `listTenantsWithStats()` from `@/lib/platform/tenants` (`tenants.ts:171`)** — the EXISTING cross-tenant card feed already powering `/salonger` (`salonger/page.tsx:31`). It reads cross-tenant via `platformCtx()` (platform_admin RLS bypass), batched (no N+1). Returns `TenantCardItem[]` (`tenants.ts:147–160`). Call it server-side in `salonger/ny/page.tsx` and pass to `OnboardingStudio` → `SuperEntry` (since the studio is client). 

**Field map (design DEMO_TENANTS → real `TenantCardItem`):**
| design row field | real field | note |
|---|---|---|
| avatar initial | `name[0]` | |
| avatar bg (`dot`) | `markColor` | salon primary or deterministic palette pick (`tenants.ts:162–168`) |
| title | `name` | |
| subline `{slug}.corevo.se · {branch}` | `slug` (+ `themeLabel`) | **`TenantCardItem` has NO vertical/branch display field.** W1: show `{slug}.corevo.se` + `themeLabel` in that slot, OR extend the existing select to add `vertical_id` and resolve via the already-loaded `presets.verticals` (still one query). See §10. |
| `{bookings} bokn.` | `bookings` | honest 0 |
| status badge | `displayStatus` | `active`→success "Aktiv", `onboarding`→info "Onboarding", `suspended`→"Pausad" |

**Stat cards (design hardcodes `24/21/6 240/24 960` — DEMO):** Kunder = `tenants.length`; Aktiva = `tenants.filter(t=>t.displayStatus==='active').length`. **Bokningar·mån + Underlag·mån have no monthly aggregate in this loader → omit them or render a visible "—"/stub; never display fake numbers** (§9).

**Layout (port `stages.jsx:19–61`):** outer `height 100% overflowY auto bg --c-cream`; inner `maxWidth 1080 margin 0 auto padding "40px 40px 60px"`; header row (SEyebrow "Plattform · superbooking@corevo.se" + h1 **"Kunder"** fs34 `--c-forest` + intro p) with primary CTA `Onboarda ny kund` (icon plus) → `onStart`; stats grid `repeat(4,1fr) gap14`; customer-list `Card pad=0` (header "Alla kunder" + info badge "multi-tenant · RLS per tenant_id"); rows (avatar 38×38 / middle / `{bookings} bokn.` / status badge); gold "+ ny" footer row → `onStart`.

**Empty state:** the design has NONE (always maps + footer). W1 must add a minimal honest empty state when `tenants.length===0` (keep the "+ Onboarda en ny kund" footer-row CTA visible).

---

## 9. HONESTY MARKERS (every W1 control NOT yet wired — no fake success, no fake data)

1. **PreviewPane** — must READ as a placeholder/skeleton, never a fake rendered site. Real render = W2. Frame chrome is real; `children` is an explicit "Förhandsvisning kommer (W2)" skeleton.
2. **Lansera launch theatre** — do NOT animate the design's 6 fake DB-task lines ("Skapar tenant… Aktiverar N moduler… Skickar magic-link… Bustar cache"). The createTenant WRITE is real; surface the real `ActionState.success`/`error` only. `LaunchSequence` mock = W3.
3. **`result` stage** — show only the real success message + slug; the design's `CustomerAdmin` mock tab is W-later, not W1.
4. **SuperEntry stat cards** — Bokningar·mån + Underlag·mån are demo numbers with no loader source → omit or visible stub. Kunder/Aktiva are real.
5. **`modplace`** — no `tenant_site_pages`, no `placement` in cfg → honest "kommer senare" empty state, no draggable list.
6. **`modconf`** — display-only in design; W1 = minimal placeholder, no inputs.
7. **`tjanster`** — no services in W1 cfg → honest empty state; its StepRail `done` is always false (truthful). Services+prices = W3.
8. **`text` hero/ingress + click-edit-in-preview** — deferred (W2/W5); only the real Företagsnamn field is wired; `site_content_draft='{}'`.
9. **`brand` logo upload** — placeholder box only; not wired (real File + R2 later).
10. **booking variant** — no UI in W1; always submits `'wizard'`. Do not render a variant picker that doesn't persist a distinct value (drawer/inline resolve to wizard anyway, `booking-variant.ts:80–91`).
11. **`granska` checklist** — derive from REAL cfg fields; do not show green for unwired panels (services/placement) as if complete.

---

## 10. OPEN RISKS (decide before/at build)

1. **Slug "touched" wrinkle.** Design's PanelNamn subdomain field calls `A.patch({slug})` directly (`studio.jsx:104`), bypassing `setSlug`/`slugTouched` → manual slug gets overwritten by later name edits. **Resolve: wire the W1 subdomän field through a `setSlug` action that sets `slugTouched=true`** (StudioCfg already has the field). This is the correct behavior, not the design bug.
2. **Branch display in SuperEntry rows.** `listTenantsWithStats()` returns `themeLabel`/`variantLabel` but no vertical/branch name. Design shows `· {branch}`. **Decide:** (a) show `themeLabel` in that slot (zero change), or (b) add `vertical_id` to the existing select (`tenants.ts:175`) and resolve via the already-loaded `presets.verticals` (one query, minor). Recommend (a) for W1 minimalism; flag for Zivar.
3. **Icon coverage.** Design references many Lucide names (`building, link, palette, layers, grid, settings, sun, edit, scissors, user, checkCircle, rocket, check, sliders, globe, chevronRight, arrowLeft, arrowRight, plus, trendUp, dollar, alert, grip, chevronDown, trash, upload, minus, clock, shield`). The existing `portal/ui` `Icon` set may not cover all. **Builder must verify; add missing names to the Icon component (presentational, allowed) — do not silently drop icons.**
4. **Token coverage.** Some design tokens used by StepRail/SuperEntry (`--c-on-forest-2, --c-forest-300, --c-forest-700, --c-success-bg, --c-info-bg, --c-gold-100, --shadow-lg, --dur-fast, --ease-out`) go beyond the subset `CreateTenantForm` uses. **Verify all §3 tokens exist in `packages/ui/tokens.css`; add any missing presentational token there (not hardcoded hex).**
5. **Theme key casing/value.** Studio `theme` values must be the 5 lowercase `STOREFRONT_THEMES` keys (`salvia/leander/zigge/linnea/edit`), NOT the design's Capitalized `ST_THEMES` labels (`Salvia`...). `pickTheme` lowercases but only accepts those 5 — any other template key silently becomes `leander`. If `presets.templatesByVertical` ever yields a DB template key outside the 5, the studio either maps it into the 5 or accepts the leander fallback. Surface to Zivar (matches goal-47 "DB template-bron" gap).
6. **`init` theme default.** Use `initStudioCfg('salvia')` to match design INIT "Salvia" and `CreateTenantForm` state default (`:215`); note the server createTenant fallback is `'leander'` — harmless since the studio always sends an explicit theme.
7. **Panel-body fidelity vs scope-lock.** Design panels show rich per-module/branch metadata (icons, `short`, badges, `variantNote`, TChips, SpecStrips) that lives ONLY in cfg-data mockup, not in real `VerticalPresetData` (`modules:{key,name}[]`, options `{key,name,defaultState}`). **Directive: derive what real presets allow (rec/opt = `defaultState!=='off'`); render reduced where data is absent; mark deferred. Do NOT port the cfg-data const catalog as if it were product data.** If Zivar wants the full rich module cards, that needs a real module-metadata source (separate decision, likely a later wave).
8. **booking-variant parity.** The legacy `CreateTenantForm` exposes a booking-variant picker (Moduler step); the design studio shell does not. W1 follows the design (no picker, default wizard). If Zivar expects feature parity with the old form, add a variant control — flag, don't silently add.
